posts.title: Construction is underway at Lookout Ridge
posts.excerpt: The streets are paved, signage is installed, and the first home in StoneRidge's newest phase is officially under construction.
posts.body:
We are excited to share that construction has officially begun on new homes in the latest phase at StoneRidge. Our dedicated team has been working diligently to prepare the community for this milestone.

The streets are now paved, signage has been installed throughout the phase, and the very first home is already under construction. Each homesite at Lookout Ridge was positioned to take advantage of the natural terrain and the long views across the golf course and out toward the Bradshaw Mountains.

If you have been waiting for the right moment to join the community, this is it. Join the interest list and we will reach out as new homesites are released.
